monitor_the_situation.title: Iran Launches Ballistic Missiles and Drones at Bahrain, Jordan, Kuwait, Iraq
Sirens Blare Across Kuwait Amid Iran Strikes
— S4 · Conflict · Kuwait · 11h ago. Air raid sirens sounded across Kuwait after Iranian missile and drone strikes, as US military claims retaliation.
US Strikes Targets Southeast of Ahvaz in Khuzestan, Iran
— S4 · Conflict · Ahvaz, Khuzestan, Iran · 19h ago. US airstrikes hit targets southeast of Ahvaz in Khuzestan Province, southwestern Iran, according to Tasnim News Agency, amid ongoing US-Iran war.
